criteria.method: YouTube internal API /youtubei/v1/search, 35 queries, channels filter (EgIQAg==), 514 unique channels scraped

filtered_creators.title: Black CSGO en Español
filtered_creators.notes: Spanish CS2 individual creator — 'mi canal de Counter Strike en el que podrás encontrar contenido de CS:GO diario'

filtered_creators.title: vLADOPARD
filtered_creators.notes: Hispanic CS2 creator — main channel (secondary @vladopardcs2 with 88.7K was in 20k-100k range)

filtered_creators.title: SirMaza
filtered_creators.notes: Spanish shooter creator — 'el mejor creador de contenido de shooters (Valorant y Counter Strike)'; also has Twitch 472K

filtered_creators.title: Dareh
filtered_creators.notes: Spanish CS2 individual creator — 'subo momentos graciosos de mis partidas de csgo'

filtered_creators.title: FlipiN #LosFieles
filtered_creators.notes: Spanish ex-pro CS player — 'Counter-Strike como forma de vida'

filtered_creators.title: Serious
filtered_creators.notes: Argentine CS2 individual creator — '¿Que onda Mabel? Subo vídeos de CS2'

excluded_in_range.title: Diamond Esports Center
excluded_in_range.reason: Spanish gaming center org, not individual creator

excluded_in_range.title: Spreen Vods
excluded_in_range.reason: Argentine variety VOD channel — not primarily CS2

excluded_in_range.title: vLADOPARD 5
excluded_in_range.reason: Secondary channel of vLADOPARD (main already included)

notes: 514 unique channels found across 35 queries. 23 in 100k-500k range. 6 classified as individual Hispanic CS2 creators.
